LanguageData.CorsairBroadside.label: broadside overdrive
LanguageData.CorsairBroadside.description: Force your combat rhythm into a short broadside burst. Fire faster and aim quicker, but incoming fire becomes harder to shrug off.
LanguageData.CorsairPlunderMark.label: plunder mark
LanguageData.CorsairPlunderMark.description: Tag a target as ripe salvage, slowing their movement and making them easier to finish.
